prose:
Fukui reactivity indices were computed for benzaldehyde using DFT with the B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis set at tier `standard`. The calculation was performed in the gas phase at charge 0 and multiplicity 1 on a fixed geometry sourced from the provided .xyz file (`/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/benzaldehyde/benzaldehyde.xyz`).

Key results include the most electrophilic site at atom C3 (C, f⁺ = 0.39939) and the most nucleophilic site at atom O1 (O, f⁻ = 0.23840). Reactivity maps for nucleophilic and electrophilic regions are available from `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/benzaldehyde/argo_gpt-4o/20260706-172354_benzaldehyde_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png`.
